---
title: "USA Crime Statistics"
subtitle: "Graphs for crime statistics from the FBI"
summary:  "Graphs for crime statistics from the FBI"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
author: "Derek Michael Wright <wrightmderek@gmail.com> [www.dblogr.com/](https://dblogr.com/dblogr/crime_usa/)"
tags: [ "dblogr", "Politics" ]
draft: true
weight: 6
codefolding_show: "hide"
image:
  preview_only: true
links:
  - icon_pack: fas
    icon: code
    name: R Script
    url: https://derekmichaelwright.github.io/htmls/dblogr/crime_usa.html
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = T, message = F, warning = F)
```

---

# Data

https://ucr.fbi.gov/crime-in-the-u.s/2019/crime-in-the-u.s.-2019/topic-pages/tables/expanded-homicide-data-table-8.xls

[**< Download Data >**](https://github.com/derekmichaelwright/dblogr/blob/master/content/dblogr/crime_usa/crime_usa_data.csv)

---

# Prepare data

```{r}
# devtools::install_github("derekmichaelwright/agData")
library(agData) # Loads: tidyverse, ggpubr, ggbeeswarm, ggrepel
```

```{r}
# Prep data
dd <- read.csv("crime_usa_data.csv")
DT::datatable(dd)
```

```{r}
# Prep data
xx <- dd %>% 
  gather(Year, Value, 2:ncol(.)) %>%
  mutate(Weapons = factor(Weapons, levels = rev(unique(Weapons))),
         Year = as.numeric(substr(Year, 2, 5)),
         Value = as.numeric(gsub(",", "", Value))) %>%
  filter(Year == 2019)
# Plot
mp <- ggplot(xx, aes(x = Weapons, y = Value / 1000)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", color = "black", fill = "darkred", alpha = 0.8) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = 1:14) +
  coord_flip() +
  theme_agData() +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Thousand Murders",
       caption = "\xa9 www.dblogr.com/  |  Data: FBI")
ggsave("crime_usa_01.png", width = 6, height = 4)
```

```{r echo = F}
ggsave("featured.png", mp, width = 6, height = 4)
```

![](crime_usa_01.png)

---

&copy; Derek Michael Wright [www.dblogr.com/](https://dblogr.com/)
